name: Seafood Cocktail in a Shell
recipeInstructions:
1. Divide the pastry into six even-sized pieces and roll each one out to line a 10-12.5 cm (4-5 in) scallop shell. Brush the rim with egg.
2. Bake the shells blind until they are lightly browned and crisp.
3. Cool the baked shells completely.
4. Meanwhile, fillet the fish into bite-sized pieces. In a pan, poach the fish with vermouth, onion, butter, and seasoning for about 5 minutes, or until cooked through. Remove from heat and let cool.
5. Discard the onion.
6. Combine mayonnaise with mustard, dill, tomato paste, and seasonings to taste in a bowl. Gradually fold in the cooled fish juices until you achieve a coating consistency.
7. Gently mix in the remaining drained fish.
8. To serve, spoon the mixture into the freshly baked pastry shells.
